perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with three women sitting on a light-colored floor around a small, ornate white table covered in stacks of New Taiwan Dollar bills; they are each holding long strings with sticky-hand toy ends. (2) The sequence shows them taking turns dropping the sticky toys onto the cash, attempting to lift bills off the table; the women react with wide smiles, pointing, and expressions of shock as they succeed or fail. (3) Visual effects such as falling red envelopes, gold coins, and large 'red envelope' graphics are layered over the footage as the women gather their winnings and celebrate together in the final frame.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, high-tempo festive track with traditional Chinese instrumental elements (percussion and strings) plays throughout. Three female voices speak enthusiastically, explaining the rules of a New Year's game. (2) Sounds of the sticky toys slapping the table surface are synchronized with the visual action, accompanied by 'ding' sound effects for success and comical 'boing' or buzzer sounds for failure. (3) The audio concludes with a crescendo of the music, loud cheers, and the sound of many coins clinking together as they celebrate their 'winnings.'
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '過年除了包紅包' (Besides giving red envelopes during New Year) - Contextual hook. (2) '自己的紅包自己黏!' (Stick your own red envelopes!) - Game explanation. (3) '媽媽第一位' (Mom is first), '姊姊失敗' (Sister failed), '哇 媽媽太強了吧' (Wow, Mom is too strong) - Descriptive captions identifying players and their performance. (4) '今年的戰績' (This year's score) - Final tally of winnings shown with a triumphant tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Game Play Loop -> Final Results and Celebration

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 women are sitting around a table for the duration of the clip.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Three young women in casual winter wear: one in a purple cardigan, one in a white hoodie with a white fuzzy hat, and one in a cream-colored sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor room with cream-paneled walls and a white rug; a small white French-style coffee table sits in the center.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Action Demo -> Climax -> Results
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by showcasing a creative and engaging Lunar New Year game involving sticky toys and cash, promoting a sense of family fun and holiday celebration.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses on a home-made game for personal entertainment during a holiday.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text captions and festive holiday theme.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of New Taiwan Dollar (NTD) bills and Traditional Chinese text strongly localizes the content to Taiwan.
